title: share: do bitshifts after the type is checked to be valid
author: bagder

linked_issues.title: Undefined behavior in curl_share_setopt() UNSHARE path: bit shift before validation

issue_comments.body:
Analysis of PR #21226 at [1c4f98e7](https://github.com/curl/curl/commit/1c4f98e76614da8044680c052f06a39957d63133):

[Test 1501 failed](https://github.com/curl/curl/actions/runs/24001845082/job/69999071121), which has NOT been flaky recently, so **there could be a real issue in this PR**.  Note that this test has failed in 12 different CI jobs (the link just goes to one of them).

###### Generated by [Testclutch](https://testclutch.curl.se/)

review_comments.body: silly suggestion since of course all the valid ones are less than 32

label_notes: Maintainer self-close (bagder) of real UB fix for #21224 due to CI test failure (testclutch flagged Test 1501 in 12 jobs, not flaky). Substantive engineering, real technical discussion with Copilot review. Different rejected_quality sub-pattern: maintainer-CI-driven-self-close vs. first-time-contributor silent rejects. Adds curl repo diversity to rejected_quality class.
